Consolidated Company Daily Report - Blueprint
Date: 2026-05-12
Prepared by: Operations and Corporate Manager
Reporting Cutoff Time: 9:30 PM

1. HR - Human Resources
- Attendance: Present: most of core team. Absent: 1 PM on sick leave.
- HR Issues:
  - TFT inspection conducted; cleaner assigned for 4pm tomorrow.
  - Warehouse access issue in Pasig resolved.
  - Finalized genset draft contract for 4-storey project tomorrow.

2. Architecture
- Pearl de Flore - Material specifications file preparation ongoing for submission. 70%.
- Opatra - Re-rendered reception, rooms, and office due to lighting changes. 100%.

3. Project Management and Site Updates
- Pearl de Flore: Smoke detector installation completed. Punchlist completed. 90% progress.
- Fixifoot: Textured paint completed. Joinery items delivered. 90% progress.
- Icon 18H: Electrical plan revision ongoing. Water heater pending.
- 4 Storey: Acquired conformed genset supplier checklist.

4. Procurement
- ACP for Manila Bay ordered, warehouse delivery tomorrow.
- Door supplier quotation for Opatra Gensan still awaiting reply.
- CEO decisions needed: Approval of genset supplier selection.

5. Missing Information Tracker
- Site manpower details for all active projects - From: PMs - Deadline: 2026-05-13 AM

6. CEO Action Items
- Approve genset supplier selection - Deadline: 2026-05-13
- Decide on Opatra Gensan replacement outsourced designer - Deadline: Immediate

7. Company Priorities for Tomorrow
- Priority 1: Finalize genset supplier evaluation for 4 STOREY project.
- Priority 2: Pearl de Flore textured paint, signage ingress, joinery deliveries on schedule.
